body:
Adds documentation page and test suite for the Optimal LAI model (`src/standalone/Vegetation/optimal_lai.jl`), which implements Zhou et al. (2025)'s seasonal-to-decadal LAI dynamics based on optimality principles.

https://clima.github.io/ClimaLand.jl/previews/PR1513

## Changes

**Documentation** (`docs/src/standalone/pages/vegetation/canopy_structure/optimal_lai.md`)
- Mathematical formulations for seasonal maximum LAI, daily steady-state LAI, and exponential moving average updates
- Parameter tables with typical values (k=0.5, z=12.227 mol m⁻² yr⁻¹, σ=0.771, α=0.067)
- Driver specifications (annual/daily GPP, precipitation, VPD, growing season length)
- Reference to Zhou et al. (2025) Global Change Biology paper

**Tests** (`test/standalone/Vegetation/test_optimal_lai.jl`)
- Parameter construction from TOML configuration
- Core functions: `compute_L_max`, `compute_m`, `lambertw0`, `compute_steady_state_LAI`, `update_LAI!`
- Edge cases: zero LAI, zero GPP, water vs. energy limitations, local noon masking
- Float32/Float64 type compatibility

**Configuration**
- Added to `docs/list_standalone_models.jl` under "Canopy structure" section
- Added to `test/runtests.jl` as `@safetestset "Optimal LAI model tests"`

## Documentation Preview

Preview will be available at: `https://clima.github.io/ClimaLand.jl/previews/PR<NUMBER>/standalone/pages/vegetation/canopy_structure/optimal_lai/`

> [!WARNING]
>
